summary: Photo Gallery v2 bug fix testing completed. Both reported bugs are FIXED: 1) Black screen when opening gallery is resolved - photos now load correctly with proper URL resolution for mobile, 2) Close (X) button is now visible and properly positioned with iOS safe area padding.

gallery_opens_on_profile_click.details: Clicking profile photo on contact detail page opens gallery modal

gallery_shows_correct_count.details: Gallery displays '11 Photos' for Forest Ward contact

thumbnail_grid_loads_all_photos.details: All 11 thumbnails visible with images loading correctly (no black screen)

thumbnail_click_opens_fullscreen.details: Clicking thumbnail opens full-screen photo viewer with correct photo

fullscreen_photo_counter.details: Full-screen viewer shows '2 of 11' format counter

fullscreen_label_and_date.details: Photo label ('Congrats - Forest Ward') and date ('3/3/2026') displayed at bottom

close_button_visible.details: X close button visible in top-left corner with proper safe area padding (not hidden under status bar)

grid_button_in_viewer.details: Grid button visible in full-screen viewer for returning to thumbnail grid

set_as_profile_button.details: Set as Profile button (gold color) appears for non-profile photos

upload_button_visible.details: Upload (+) button visible in top bar

backend_photos_all_endpoint.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos/all returns 11 photos with proper url and thumbnail_url fields

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Forest Ward contact with 11 photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo gallery v2 fix is complete. The resolvePhotoUrl() function in contact/[id].tsx prepends PHOTO_BASE_URL for relative paths on mobile. Gallery styles have iOS safe area padding (paddingTop: 56 for iOS). Backend photos/all endpoint returns relative paths like /api/images/imos/... which frontend resolves correctly. All 11 photos for Forest Ward contact load properly in both grid and full-screen views.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered

black_screen_on_gallery_open.original_issue: Photos don't load for legacy contacts - black screen shown
black_screen_on_gallery_open.root_cause: Relative photo URLs were not being resolved to absolute URLs for native mobile platforms
black_screen_on_gallery_open.fix_applied: resolvePhotoUrl() helper function added to prepend PHOTO_BASE_URL for relative paths

close_button_hidden.original_issue: X close button hidden under iOS navigation bar and unclickable
close_button_hidden.root_cause: Gallery modal lacked proper safe area insets for iOS
close_button_hidden.fix_applied: galleryTopBar style now has paddingTop: Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 56 : 16
